arts.ttl: Billionaire Dmitry Rybolovlev's makes takeover move that may be key to Amanda Staveley's Tottenham plan
Alejandro Garnacho breaks silence after brutal Man United decision on him and Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho missed Sunday's trip to Manchester City with the forward left behind by Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford won’t recover from Man United exit - I can’t believe what’s happened to him
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford continues to be the topic of discussion after the bombshell interview over his future

arts.ttl: Man Utd squad vs Tottenham revealed as bombshell Marcus Rashford decision confirmed
arts.sum: But it is a new life, it's not a disciplinary thing, it's the performance in training, the performance in game and then I have to change, to choose players." Both Garnacho and Rashford were left out of the matchday squad for the Premier League win over Manchester City on Sunday and they were instructed to train at Carrington instead .

arts.ttl: Inter Milan star 'TURNS DOWN Man United to sign new contract extension' - as Ruben Amorim's Red Devils rebuild falters
arts.sum: United look set for an overhaul as Amorim aims to put his stamp on the club, with a host of comings and goings expected in the January transfer window and beyond.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford axed from Man Utd squad for Tottenham league cup clash
arts.sum: The Red Devils forward has been dropped for two straight games in a row by manager Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Lucas Bergvall decision made as £40m star drops out: Tottenham predicted XI v Man United
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will hope to take a step closer to the Carabao Cup final when they take on Manchester United in their quarter-final on Thursday...

arts.ttl: 'Spurs' lost tourists ransacked by revived Rangers'
arts.sum: Tottenham weren't ready for what Rangers threw at them but got out of jail with their Europa League equaliser, writes Tom English.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford absent from Man Utd travelling squad as Alejandro Garnacho decision made
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has revealed that he's 'ready' to leave boyhood club Manchester United, who face Tottenham for a place in the Carabao Cup semi-finals on Thursday

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou's squad update from Inside Spurs
arts.sum: Yves Bissouma returns from suspension, while Ange gave us the latest on Mikey Moore, Ben Davies, Richarlison, Cristian Romero and Micky van de Ven. Particularly relevant for this huge game, Ange reiterated that Destiny Udogie may still have a chance to feature after departing early from Sunday's 5-0 win at Southampton after feeling tightness in his quad.
